sections.text:
CHAPTER 250
CATTLE SLAUGHTER (CONTROL) 28 of 1959
45 of 1957
13 of 1966
An Act to control the slaughter of immature and breeding cattle; and to provide for Government Notices
matters incidental thereto. 319 of 1964
497 of 1964
[30th July, 1948] Act No.
13 of 1994
Copyright Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
The Laws of Zambia

sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Cattle Slaughter (Control) Act, and shall apply to Short title and
sections.text:
such areas in Zambia, and to such types or classes of cattle, as the Minister may, by application
statutory notice, direct.

sections.heading: In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires- Interpretation
Where an inspector is satisfied that it is necessary or desirable in the public Grant of permit for
sections.text:
interest to do so, he may grant a permit to any person authorising the slaughter of such cattle slaughter
number of immature cattle or female cattle under the age of ten years as he may specify
thereon.
(No. 13 of 1966)

sections.heading: (1) No person shall slaughter any number of immature cattle or female cattle Restriction on
sections.text:
under the age of ten years- slaughter of certain
cattle
(a) unless he is in possession of a permit granted in respect of the slaughter
thereof; or
(b) exceeding the number specified on such permit.
(2) Every person who slaughters immature cattle or female cattle under the age of
ten years shall, not later than thirty days after such cattle are slaughtered, furnish to the
Director of Veterinary Services-
(a) the permit granted in respect of the slaughter thereof; and
(b) such information relating to such cattle and the slaughter thereof as the
Minister may, by statutory order, require to be furnished.
Copyright Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
The Laws of Zambia
(3) An order made by the Minister under this section may provide for the forms to be
used and the procedure to be followed in connection with the furnishing of information to
the Director of Veterinary Services under this section.
(Amended by No. 13 of 1966)

sections.heading: For the purposes of this Act, any inspector may at all reasonable times enter Inspector's powers of
sections.text:
any land or premises where cattle are kept for slaughter or offered for sale, and any entry
abattoir or slaughter-house or other place where cattle are slaughtered, and may inspect
any cattle or carcasses found therein, and may issue an order forbidding the slaughter of
any cattle and may seize and remove any carcass or part of any carcass which would
afford evidence of a contravention of this Act.

sections.heading: Any person aggrieved by a refusal of an inspector to grant a permit may ask that Review
sections.text:
the decision be reviewed by the Minister, whose decision shall be final.
(As amended by No. 13 of 1966)

sections.heading: Any person who contravenes any of the provisions of this Act shall be guilty of Penalties
sections.text:
an offence and liable to a fine not exceeding three thousand penalty units or, in default of
payment, to imprisonment with or without hard labour for any period not exceeding six
months, or to both.
(As amended by Act No. 13 of 1994)

Order by the Minister

sections.heading: This Order may be cited as the Cattle Slaughter (Control) Act (Application) Title
The provisions of the Act shall hereafter apply throughout Zambia to all types Application of Cap.

and classes of cattle. 250
